entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop of the study

entities.name: DRY ROOT ROT
entities.description: A disease caused by Rhizoctonia bataticola that constrains chickpea production

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA BATATICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes dry root rot

entities.name: DRR RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea to resist dry root rot

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: F9 derived lines developed from a cross between susceptible and resistant lines for mapping

entities.name: BG 212
entities.description: A susceptible chickpea line used as a parent

entities.name: ICCV 08305
entities.description: A moderately resistant chickpea breeding line used as a parent

entities.name: RB 6 ISOLATE
entities.description: A specific isolate of R. bataticola used for screening

entities.name: PAPER TOWEL METHOD
entities.description: A technique used to screen parental lines and RILs for disease resistance

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research institution where the screening was conducted

entities.name: SNP GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of identifying single nucleotide polymorphisms using a genotyping platform

entities.name: AFFYMETRIX AXIOM CICERSNP ARRAY
entities.description: The specific cost-effective SNP genotyping platform used in the study

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to develop a high-density genetic map

entities.name: QDRR-8
entities.description: A minor QTL identified on CaLG08 explaining 6.70% PVE for DRR resistance

entities.name: CALG08
entities.description: The chromosome where the qDRR-8 QTL is located

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: The application of linked SNP markers in chickpea breeding programs to select for resistance
